acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The new just command is backed by a script that compares live deterministic qd export output with an expected export byte-for-byte.
The checker catches node_notes and runs drift even when node records are unchanged.
The runbooks explain when to use the parity check alongside qd sync.
Scope excludes product runtime and platform validation claims.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is qd roadmap/export hygiene and does not require product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent validation.
